skills.name: video-bgmusic
skills.description: Mix a music bed under an existing video with automatic ducking — the music drops when narration is present and comes back when the voice pauses. Pure ffmpeg sidechain compression.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-brief
skills.description: Build an LLM-readable brief of a video: metadata, silence gaps, scene changes, sampled thumbnails — everything a model needs to reason about the content without watching a single frame. No LLM or cloud API used.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-captions-burn
skills.description: Burn SRT/VTT subtitles directly into the video stream with configurable font, colour, outline and position. One ffmpeg pass, pure local.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-chapters
skills.description: Add YouTube/QuickTime chapter markers to an existing MP4 — no re-encode, just metadata. Chapters show up as a timeline scrubber in every modern player and video platform.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-concat
skills.description: Concatenate N video clips into one MP4, normalising resolution/fps and optionally adding a crossfade between each pair. One ffmpeg pass.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-cut-silences
skills.description: Remove silence gaps from a video, keeping only the speech. Accepts the silence_gaps list from video-brief or auto-detects on the fly via ffmpeg silencedetect. Output is a re-encoded MP4 with micro-fades at every cut so you never hear a pop.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-image-from-prompt
skills.description: Generate a still image from a text prompt. Supports native OpenAI Images (gpt-image-1 / dall-e-3) and OpenRouter multimodal chat (Gemini Flash Image, Flux, etc.). Designed as the generative source for video-slideshow pipelines.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-intro-outro
skills.description: Prepend an intro clip and/or append an outro clip to an existing video, with a smooth crossfade at every join. Auto-normalises resolution / fps / codec so branded intros shot at different specs slot in cleanly.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-lowerthirds
skills.description: Overlay timed text bands (lower-thirds, chapter markers, speaker names, call-outs) on a video with configurable position, font, colour, and semi-transparent background box. One ffmpeg pass.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-pip
skills.description: Overlay a second video as a picture-in-picture inset on a main video — classic tutorial webcam overlay, reaction video, multi-cam. Configurable position, scale, and audio mixing.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-slideshow
skills.description: Turn a list of images (and optional narration audio) into an MP4 slideshow with Ken Burns zoom and crossfade transitions. One ffmpeg pass, pure local.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-speed
skills.description: Speed up or slow down a video with optional pitch preservation on the audio track. Handles 0.25× slow-mo all the way up to 4× fast playback, breaking the audio into an atempo chain so the pitch stays natural.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-storyboard-from-script
skills.description: Turn a narration script into a visual storyboard: an LLM decomposes it into N shots, then a generative image model renders one illustration per shot. Output is ready to feed video-slideshow.
skills.author: Agentino

skills.name: video-voiceover
skills.description: Turn a script into a narrated WAV + synced SRT. Works offline with macOS `say` or local `piper`; falls back to `edge-tts` for neural voices. Built to feed video-slideshow + video-captions-burn.
skills.author: Agentino
